title: Unsupported locale redirects to English home with working site shell navigation
description: Verifies that visiting an unsupported locale redirects to English home and the user can navigate to English programs and trainers using the site shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /fr
Wait for the page to finish loading
Click the link to view the programs list
Click the link to view the trainers directory
Verify the trainers directory is displayed
Verify the page is in English and uses left-to-right direction

title: Arabic locale renders RTL layout and preserves Arabic localization across navigation
description: Verifies that the Arabic home renders with RTL direction and navigating to the trainers page keeps Arabic localization.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Wait for the page to finish loading
Click the link to view the trainers directory
Verify the trainers directory is displayed
Verify the page is in Arabic and uses right-to-left direction

title: Unsupported locale trainers route redirects to English trainers directory
description: Verifies that visiting trainers under an unsupported locale redirects to the English trainers page and renders the directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /xx/trainers
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the trainers directory is displayed
Verify the page is in English and uses left-to-right direction

title: English locale renders LTR layout and consistent site shell
description: Verifies that the English home renders with the site shell and left-to-right direction.

steps.description: Navigate to /en
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the navigation bar and footer are displayed
Verify the page uses left-to-right direction

title: Arabic locale renders site shell with RTL direction
description: Verifies that the Arabic home renders the navigation bar and footer with RTL direction.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the navigation bar and footer are displayed
Verify the page uses right-to-left direction

title: English programs listing renders from data source and can return to home without losing locale
description: Verifies that the English programs page shows a programs list and the user can navigate back to English home via the site shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /en/programs
Wait for the page to finish loading
Click the link to go to the home page
Verify the user lands on the English home page
Verify the page is in English and uses left-to-right direction

title: English trainers directory renders from data source
description: Verifies that the English trainers page displays a populated trainers directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /en/trainers
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the trainers directory is displayed
Verify the page is in English and uses left-to-right direction

title: Arabic trainers directory renders localized to Arabic
description: Verifies that the Arabic trainers page displays the trainers directory with Arabic localization and RTL direction.

steps.description: Navigate to /ar/trainers
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify the trainers directory is displayed
Verify the page is in Arabic and uses right-to-left direction
